# Search Requirements Checklist: Search for Available Classes

**Purpose**: Validate requirements quality for class-search scope, ordering,
and failure behavior  
**Created**: 2026-03-14  
**Feature**: [/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/013-search-available-classes/spec.md](/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/013-search-available-classes/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based
on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are required search inputs and filters fully defined for student use? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK002 Is default active-term behavior and override behavior explicitly specified? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK003 Are displayed result metadata fields fully enumerated for each class row? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK004 Are no-results requirements defined with actionable refinement guidance? [Completeness, Spec §FR-009]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is result ordering defined with deterministic tie-break logic? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK006 Is "available" status defined unambiguously for listings shown to students? [Clarity, Ambiguity]
- [ ] CHK007 Is freshness policy for seat availability quantifiable and testable? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK008 Are failure-message expectations specific enough for consistent UX text? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK009 Do user-story acceptance scenarios align with failure-handling requirements in FR-010 and FR-011? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK010 Do edge cases align with functional requirements for empty queries and no-match behavior? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK011 Are UC-13 references consistent across stories, requirements, and success criteria? [Consistency, Spec §User Stories, Spec §FR-012]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK012 Are search outcome criteria measurable without implementation assumptions? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-002]
- [ ] CHK013 Are failure-path criteria measurable and traceable to UC-13 extension 2a? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003]
- [ ] CHK014 Can timestamp freshness compliance be objectively verified from written requirements? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]

## Scenario and Edge-Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK015 Are primary, no-results, and service-failure scenarios all specified at requirement level? [Coverage, Spec §User Stories, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK016 Are stale-data labeling expectations defined for both successful and failed search responses? [Coverage, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK017 Are boundary conditions for broad or empty queries explicitly documented? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Dependencies and Assumptions

- [ ] CHK018 Are Course Catalog Service dependency and outage assumptions documented for planning and testing? [Dependency, Gap]
- [ ] CHK019 Are traceability expectations to UC-13 and UC-13-AS defined as release gates? [Traceability, Spec §FR-012]

## Notes

- Focus areas selected: Search quality, determinism of results, and error-flow
  requirement quality.
- Depth level: Standard (recommended default applied).
- Actor/timing: Reviewer during planning and PR review.
